melancholy1.title: The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 1
melancholy1.alt: An excited Haruhi pulls on Kyon's tie, to Kyon's dismay

melancholy2.title: The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 2
melancholy2.alt: Haruhi and Mikuru are dressed as bunny girls

melancholy3.title: The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 3
melancholy3.alt: Mikuru, dressed as a maid, sits nervously in the SOS Brigade club room as Haruhi strokes her hair

melancholy4.title: The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 4
melancholy4.alt: Kyon meets with Asakura in their classroom at sunset

melancholy5.title: The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 5
melancholy5.alt: Kyon watches Haruhi walk home alone by a railroad crossing

melancholy6.title: The Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 6
melancholy6.alt: Kyon places his hands on Haruhi's shoulders

boredom.title: The Boredom of Haruhi Suzumiya
boredom.alt: Haruhi plays baseball while dressed as a cheerleader

bambooLeafRhapsody.title: Bamboo Leaf Rhapsody
bambooLeafRhapsody.alt: A Tanabata tree hangs out of the SOS Brigade club room window

mysteriqueSign.title: Mystérique Sign
mysteriqueSign.alt: The SOS Brigade website has a data glitch

remoteIslandSyndrome1.title: Remote Island Syndrome Part 1
remoteIslandSyndrome1.alt: Haruhi, Mikuru, Nagato, and Kyon's sister relax in the ocean, reclining on inflatable tubes

remoteIslandSyndrome2.title: Remote Island Syndrome Part 2
remoteIslandSyndrome2.alt: Haruhi points confidently, making an accusation

endlessEight1.title: Endless Eight Part 1
endlessEight1.alt: Haruhi, Mikuru, and Nagato jump into the pool

endlessEight2.title: Endless Eight Part 2
endlessEight2.alt: Haruhi, Mikuru, and Nagato show off their yukata to Kyon and Koizumi

endlessEight3.title: Endless Eight Part 3
endlessEight3.alt: The SOS Brigade club members catch cicadas

endlessEight4.title: Endless Eight Part 4
endlessEight4.alt: The SOS Brigade club members (except Haruhi) are dressed in frog costumes

endlessEight5.title: Endless Eight Part 5
endlessEight5.alt: A bewildered Kyon meets with Mikuru, Nagato, and Koizumi in a park at night

endlessEight6.title: Endless Eight Part 6
endlessEight6.alt: Haruhi searches for UFOs with a telescope while Mikuru and Nagato watch

sigh1.title: The Sigh of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 1
sigh1.alt: The SOS Brigade club members discuss their plans for the cultural festival

sigh2.title: The Sigh of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 2
sigh2.alt: The SOS Brigade films outside an electronics store; Haruhi sits in a director's chair

sigh3.title: The Sigh of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 3
sigh3.alt: Mikuru, dressed as a waitress and wearing one colored contact lens, fires her "Mikuru Beam"

sigh4.title: The Sigh of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 4
sigh4.alt: Mikuru poses by a lake as the SOS Brigade club members continue filming their movie

sigh5.title: The Sigh of Haruhi Suzumiya Part 5
sigh5.alt: The SOS Brigade club members find a stray calico cat

episode00.title: The Adventures of Mikuru Asahina Episode 00

dayOfSagittarius.alt: A laptop shows the title screen of a video game named "The Day of Sagittarius III"

somedayInTheRain.alt: Haruhi and Kyon share an umbrella in the rain
